target_flow: Send and read messages in Grok desktop app (via WebCatalog)

navigation_plan.note: Bring window to front without resizing
First Tab — lands on Attach button
Second Tab — lands on input field but cursor NOT active yet
Type any single character to ACTIVATE the cursor — this is required
Select all to highlight the throwaway character
Delete the throwaway character — input is now active and empty
Set clipboard via interactive PowerShell (runPSRawInteractive with System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard)
Verify text appeared in input before sending

known_issues: First Tab hits Attach button — need TWO Tabs to reach input field
Second Tab reaches input but does NOT activate cursor — must type a character first to engage it
Paste only works after cursor is activated by a keystroke
SendKeys strips spaces in Grok — must use clipboard paste instead of type action
Ctrl+A selects nothing in Grok's chat area — cannot use /copy endpoint for reading, use screenshot
Set-Clipboard via cmd.exe does not affect desktop session — must use runPSRawInteractive
WebCatalog wrapper — Grok runs inside WebCatalog which adds extra Electron chrome
